name: GPT-5.4 nano
tagline: Cheapest model in the family; 400K context, $0.
metaDescription: GPT-5.4 nano (OpenAI), released 2026-03-17 — part of the GPT Nano line. Cheapest model in the family; 400K context, $0.20/$1.25 per 1M, API-only.
overview: GPT-5.4 nano is a large language model from OpenAI, part of the GPT Nano line. Released 2026-03-17. OpenAI's smallest, cheapest API-only line for tasks where speed and cost matter most.
What's notable in this version: Cheapest model in the family; 400K context, $0.20/$1.25 per 1M, API-only.
